raw_consumer_statement: Due to some unauthorized charges I had my American Express card closed and the new one was issued. I suppose to receive it on XX/XX/24. Despite my credit card being closed, I noticed on XX/XX/24 pending charges for {$650.00} from XXXX XXXX  for the order I never placed. I called XXXX  customer service and was told no charges were placed to my card and I didn't have any order placed on XX/XX/24. I called American Express to inform them about those unauthorized charges. On XX/XX/24 I received an email from American Express to inform me that those charges will be monitored. Today, XX/XX/24, I called American Express to find out why my credit limit in minus and was told it because of those pending charges. To my question if my phone call I made regarding those charges on the records I didn't get any response. Also I didn't get any response to why those charges were accepted if my card was closed.
